title: Plump Saudi Sausage Flatbread
description: A pillowy flatbread topped with savory German sausages, spiced rest-meat, and aromatic herbs, perfect for a romantic Saudi-inspired feast.

ingredients.name: Rest-meat mixture (ground beef or lamb with spices)

instructions: In a bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and warm water, stirring until a rough dough forms.
Knead dough on floured surface for 8 minutes until smooth; add olive oil in last 2 minutes.
Place dough in oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm spot for 60 minutes until doubled.
While dough rises, sauté diced onion in 1 tbsp olive oil until translucent, then add seasoned ground meat and cook until browned.
Slice bratwurst sausages into 1 cm thick rounds.
Punch down risen dough, divide into 4 equal portions, and roll each into a 25 cm diameter circle.
Spread tomato sauce over each flatbread, then top with cooked rest-meat, sliced sausages, and sprinkle chopped parsley.
Bake flatbreads for 12 minutes until edges are golden and cheese (if using) is melted.
Remove from oven, let cool 2 minutes, then slice and serve warm.
